summary: Frontend-only testing completed for HexTracker React Native Expo app. All features working correctly on web preview. Tested permission states, location tracking with mock GPS, H3 hex conversion, and UI components.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All text properly wrapped in Text components
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ Proper React Native components used (View, Text, ActivityIndicator)
✅ Good error handling for permission states
✅ Clean platform-specific file separation (HexMap.tsx vs HexMap.web.tsx)
✅ Proper use of useMemo and useCallback for performance optimization
✅ H3 conversion logic is accurate - verified lat 37.7749, lng -122.4194 produces H3 index 89283082803ffff at resolution 9
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed. Used mock geolocation for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React Native Expo app with no backend. The app uses expo-location for GPS tracking and h3-js for converting coordinates to H3 hex cells. On web, react-native-maps doesn't work, so a web fallback component (HexMap.web.tsx) is used via Metro's platform-specific file resolution. All tests passed successfully. The H3 conversion is accurate, permission handling works correctly, and all required testIDs are present.

test_results_detail.test_1_app_loads: PASSED - App loads without errors, shows error screen initially without permission
test_results_detail.test_2_permission_denied: PASSED - Error screen displays with correct message 'Location permission is required to track your movement.'
test_results_detail.test_3_permission_granted: PASSED - Web fallback screen displays correctly with title 'HexTracker', coordinates (37.774900, -122.419400), hex count of 1, and H3 index 89283082803ffff
test_results_detail.test_4_h3_conversion: PASSED - H3 conversion verified accurate. Lat 37.7749, lng -122.4194 at resolution 9 produces H3 index 89283082803ffff (starts with '8928' as expected)
test_results_detail.test_5_location_change: PASSED - Location change to lat 37.7750, lng -122.4180 processed correctly. Hex count remains 1 because both locations map to the same H3 cell at resolution 9 (locations are ~150m apart, H3 res 9 cells are ~174m edge length)
test_results_detail.test_6_testids: PASSED - All required testIDs present and functional: error-screen, error-message, loading-screen, loading-indicator, web-fallback-screen, hex-count-web
